name: SMOKY MEATLESS GREENS
intro: Smoky greens without the meat: savory, juicy and herby. They make a great soul side. Pair with my Return of the Mac, Lightly Sweet Potato Yams or Bronx Fried Oyster Mushrooms to complete a full meal. Make sure to wash your fresh greens and remove the big stems. Chopping the leaves into shreds helps them cook faster and retain more flavor.

ingredients.item: collard greens, washed, stemmed and shredded

method: In a large pot over medium-high heat, combine your oil, bell peppers, garlic, onion and tomato and sauté for 1 to 2 minutes.

Add your stock plus the paprika, garlic powder, salt, black pepper, red pepper flakes, cumin, liquid smoke and cinnamon. Let come to a light boil and then add your greens; they will start to cook down and shrink. Simmer the greens for 20 minutes.
Get ready to serve once done. Enjoy hot!
